mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, description, category_id, price, original_price, images, location, status, view_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (user_id, title, description, category_id, price, original_price, images, location, status, view_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{images}, #{location}, #{status}, #{viewCount})
mapper.delete: UPDATE product SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
